name: Yangtze Sturgeon
conservationEfforts: Declared extinct in the wild in 2022. Captive breeding maintains thousands of individuals. Artificial propagation and release programs continue. Yangtze fishing ban may help if reintroduced.
description: Once endemic to the upper and middle Yangtze River, this sturgeon was declared extinct in the wild in 2022 — the same year as the Chinese paddlefish. Dam construction destroyed its spawning habitat.
